_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas

_contextSnippet: Cronbach's α coefficients for the PlexiQoL were 0.90 at both time points, confirming that the items had a good level of association.
details: Cronbach's α coefficients were 0.90 at both time points
